generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about alliance commitments, but let's be real - our security depends on these partnerships. My neighbor's daughter is in the National Guard, and she says the training exercises with allies make everyone safer. It's not just about money; it's about being prepared. We can't afford to go it alone in today's world. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
